title: Allow a Monday - HubSpot Integration to Select Deals and/or specific Pipelines
excerpt: The current integration recipe options bringing info from HubSpot to Monday, will pull ALL deals from HubSpot into Monday.  It would be very helpful if the recipe would allow specific Deals and/or only specific HubSpot p…

posts.author: kbrewergouthro (Kathi)
posts.cookedHtml: The current integration recipe options bringing info from HubSpot to Monday, will pull ALL deals from HubSpot into Monday. It would be very helpful if the recipe would allow specific Deals and/or only specific HubSpot pipelines into Monday and not ALL pipelines/deals by default.

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: @kbrewergouthro , you could accomplish this using Zapier or the like. Let me know if you’d like to explore this platform
